metadata.notes: Main agent owns release mutations and closure.

status_rules.complete_rule: Record file, command, run URL, release URL, or review evidence.
status_rules.repair_rule: Repair the smallest failed release item before continuing.

prohibited_shortcuts: Do not create the tag before preflight is complete.
Do not publish an incomplete draft.
Do not rewrite an existing release tag.
Do not omit checksum, signature, sidecar, warning, or notarization checks.

items.title: Review and converge release plans
acceptance: Initial specialist findings are recorded, plan revisions are made, and convergence review approves implementation.
items.result: Testing/release-integrity and security/operability convergence reviews completed with no blocking findings.

items.title: Harden tagged release workflow
acceptance: Signing secret is limited to the signing step.
The public-key secret is nonempty 64-hex, equals the public key derived from the signing key, equals the distributed client's embedded or configured key, and verifies SHA256SUMS.sig.
Expected 24 release assets, 22 checksum entries, checksums, forbidden .app bundle assets, and both LICENSE.txt and THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.txt in every archive and standalone sidecar are validated.
An existing release or asset for the tag stops the workflow; uploads never use --clobber and never overwrite release assets.
items.result: Signing key/client key round-trip validation, immutable release creation, exact bundle validation, and regression tests implemented; cargo tests/clippy/audit and bundle validator tests passed.

items.title: Create durable release incident runbook
acceptance: The runbook defines severity criteria, acquisition-stop actions, GitHub Release warning actions, update-feed stop and impact checks, owners, evidence storage, patch-release decision, user notice, and closure criteria.
The runbook forbids overwriting published tags and assets.
verification: Documentation review and pre-publish specialist review
items.result: docs/RELEASE_INCIDENT_RUNBOOK.md created with severity, containment, ownership, evidence, patch, notice, and closure procedures.

items.title: Prepare v0.18.9 metadata
acceptance: Version and changelog describe v0.18.9 from v0.18.8..HEAD.
items.result: Cargo.toml/Cargo.lock set to 0.18.9; CHANGELOG dated 2026-06-13 and release body draft covers v0.18.8..HEAD.

items.title: Record release candidate GUI evidence
acceptance: Windows GSM-006 and GSM-008 record selection, edit focus/select-all, deletion cancel/confirm, Apply and OK in a dated PASS/FAIL/SKIPPED report with evidence paths.
Evidence needed for the publish decision is copied to docs/releases/evidence/v0.18.9/.
macOS GUI is explicitly SKIPPED with environment reason and macOS CI test/build substitute evidence.
items.result: Windows GSM-006/GSM-008 and headful smoke passed; a focus/select-all regression was found, fixed with a test, rebuilt, and reverified. Durable evidence is under docs/releases/evidence/v0.18.9/. macOS GUI is SKIPPED with CI substitute evidence.

items.title: Verify PowerShell native GNU build
acceptance: Changed PowerShell scripts parse.
Regression, CheckOnly, native build, and artifact validation pass.
Executable hashes, resource section, manifest, subsystem, and DLL dependencies are recorded.
items.result: Regression tests, CheckOnly, native GNU release build, and artifact validation passed. Final FlistWalker.exe and flistwalker.exe were byte-identical with SHA-256 5826EFB5A34650B9ACD1FD4632402F2895171C356314935BA7C4FE42816D1F64.

items.title: Run release preflight
acceptance: VM-002/005 and project release preflight pass.
verification: Tests, clippy, audit, PowerShell checks, required grep, docs/assets/OSS review.
items.result: cargo test --locked (504 tests, 6 ignored), clippy -D warnings, cargo audit, shell validators, PowerShell checks, four-target cargo metadata, required greps, ID ordering review, OSS review, and GUI evidence passed. No dependency changes beyond the root version.

items.title: Commit release preparation and verify CI
acceptance: Preparation commit is on master and CI is green.
items.result: Release preparation commit 563b9af was pushed to master. CI Cross Platform run 27450898304 passed all Linux, macOS, Windows native, Windows GNU cross, clippy/coverage, and cargo-audit jobs.

items.title: Create and push v0.18.9 tag
acceptance: Remote refs/tags/v0.18.9 is absent before creation; an existing tag stops the release and is never updated or deleted.
The tag is annotated; preparation commit SHA equals local and remote peeled SHAs; tag object SHA and peeled commit SHA are recorded.
verification: git ls-remote, git cat-file, git rev-parse, and gh run list

items.title: Verify tagged release workflow and draft
acceptance: All release jobs succeed; warnings block by default, and any exception records warning text, impact, approver, and reason in the pre-publish review and durable release record.
Downloaded draft contains exactly 24 expected assets and 22 checksum entries.
Checksums, signature, version names, .app exclusion, and both LICENSE.txt and THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.txt in every archive and standalone sidecar pass.

items.title: Finalize v0.18.9 release body
acceptance: Body follows fixed format, matches v0.18.8..v0.18.9, and states macOS is not notarized.
verification: gh release view and body policy grep

items.title: Perform specialist pre-publish review
acceptance: Findings are handled and publish is approved.

Warning exceptions, if any, and docs/RELEASE_INCIDENT_RUNBOOK.md with concrete criteria, GitHub Release/update-feed operations, owners, evidence storage, patch decision, user notice, and closure criteria are approved.

items.title: Publish v0.18.9
acceptance: Release is public with the reviewed body and assets.
A post-publish incident never overwrites the published tag or assets and follows the approved containment runbook.

items.title: Write durable v0.18.9 release evidence
acceptance: Permanent release evidence contains URLs, tag object and peeled commit SHAs, durable GUI evidence paths, PowerShell/asset/signature results, warnings, skips, and pre-publish review.

items.title: Perform specialist final review
acceptance: Findings are handled and closure is approved.

items.title: Remove temporary plan artifacts
acceptance: Temporary artifacts are removed and closure commit is pushed.
verification: git status, git diff, CI status
